title: The Rooms That Can't Say No — Daniel Fox
meta_description: As it becomes possible to score any room in real time, the highest-stakes rooms are the ones where people can't leave or say no. A music behaviorist's case for a permission ethic, with an honest look at what the research does and does not support.

schema.headline: The Rooms That Can't Say No
schema.description: Behavioral music is heading into hospitals, care homes, classrooms, and transit. A case for a permission-based ethic in the rooms where people can least leave or consent, grounded honestly in what the research supports.
